parameters.jsonBody:
={{ ({
  case_id:             $json.case_id,
  timestamp:           $json.timestamp,
  submitted_by:        $json.submitted_by,
  user_name:           $json.user_name,
  contact_number:      $json.contact_number,
  date_of_birth:       $json.date_of_birth,
  civil_status:        $json.civil_status,
  address:             $json.address,
  occupation:          $json.occupation,
  legal_topic:         $json.legal_topic,
  legal_issue:         $json.legal_issue,
  incident_date:       $json.incident_date,
  opposing_party:      $json.opposing_party,
  urgency:             $json.urgency,
  legal_narrative:     $json.legal_narrative,
  clerk_notes:         $json.clerk_notes,
  documents_submitted: $json.documents_submitted || [],
  document_urls:       $json.document_urls || []
}) }}

parameters.responseBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  status:              'INTAKE_COMPLETE',
  case_id:             $json.case_id,
  timestamp:           $json.timestamp,
  submitted_by:        $json.submitted_by,
  client: {
    name:              $json.user_name,
    contact:           $json.contact_number,
    date_of_birth:     $json.date_of_birth,
    civil_status:      $json.civil_status,
    address:           $json.address,
    occupation:        $json.occupation
  },
  case_details: {
    legal_topic:       $json.legal_topic,
    legal_issue:       $json.legal_issue,
    incident_date:     $json.incident_date,
    opposing_party:    $json.opposing_party,
    urgency:           $json.urgency
  },
  documents_submitted: $json.documents_submitted || [],
  clerk_notes:         $json.clerk_notes,
  document_urls:       $json.document_urls || [],
  upload_errors:       $json.upload_errors || null,
  message:             'Case received and saved. AI pipeline triggered.',
  pipeline_status:     'LAWYER_A_TRIGGERED'
}) }}
